spec: Optimize framer-motion bundle: LazyMotion + m components on result page (~78kB → ~5kB)
rationale: Result page is the viral sharing entry point (shared links land here). framer-motion static import adds ~78kB unnecessary JS. LazyMotion with domAnimation feature subset + m.* shorthand components reduces this to ~5kB. Mechanical replacement: motion.div → m.div, wrap in <LazyMotion features={domAnimation}>. No visual change, only bundle size improvement. This has been a residual problem for 5+ cycles.
testCriteria: framer-motion/m import used instead of motion
